testcase.name: Cloud Smoke › should load dashboard after login
Cloud Smoke › should display sidebar with navigation
Cloud Smoke › should load Callers page
Cloud Smoke › should load Domains page
Cloud Smoke › should load Pipeline page
Cloud Smoke › should load Specs page
Cloud Smoke › should load Quick Launch page
Cloud Smoke › should load Settings page
Cloud Smoke › health API should return ok

failure.message: smoke.spec.ts:65:7 health API should return ok

testcase.failure:
[cloud] › tests/cloud/smoke.spec.ts:65:7 › Cloud Smoke › health API should return ok ─────────────
TimeoutError: page.goto: Timeout 60000ms exceeded. Call log: - navigating to "http://localhost:3000/login", waiting until "load"
at fixtures/auth.fixture.ts:21
19 | const login = async (email: string, password = process.env.SEED_ADMIN_PASSWORD || 'admin123') => { 20 | const isCloud = !!process.env.CLOUD_E2E; > 21 | await page.goto('/login', { timeout: isCloud ? 60000 : 30000 }); | ^ 22 | await page.waitForLoadState('networkidle', { timeout: isCloud ? 30000 : 15000 }); 23 | 24 | // Fill credentials at loginAs (/Users/paulwander/projects/HF/apps/admin/e2e/fixtures/auth.fixture.ts:21:18) at /Users/paulwander/projects/HF/apps/admin/e2e/tests/cloud/smoke.spec.ts:13:11

testcase.name: Cloud Smoke › ready API should confirm specs loaded

failure.message: smoke.spec.ts:72:7 ready API should confirm specs loaded
